description_long: This object consists of a group of five distinct lotion bottles, each with a unique shape and color. The bottles are made of translucent glass or plastic, allowing the colored contents inside to be visible. Each bottle is sealed with a decorative cap, most of which appear to be screw-on stoppers with spiral or geometric designs. The colors of the bottles include green, blue, purple, orange, and a lighter blue, giving the set a vibrant and eye-catching appearance. The surfaces of the bottles are smooth and slightly glossy, reflecting light softly. No visible branding, product names, or graphic patterns are present on the exterior.
description: A colorful set of five smooth, translucent lotion bottles with decorative caps and no visible branding.
description_view_0: Front view shows the green and blue bottles most prominently, with the purple, orange, and square blue bottles partially visible behind.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the blue bottle in the foreground, with the green, purple, orange, and square blue bottles arranged behind it.
description_view_2: The purple and orange bottles are more visible in this view, with the green, blue, and square blue bottles forming the background.
description_view_3: The orange bottle is at the front, with the green, blue, purple, and square blue bottles arranged behind and to the side.
